info.name: 02-Case1PlatformAbsorbs
info.description: Case-1 money model (deductFromDriver=false, platform absorbs). Approve -> asserts the BPP legs are ALL SellerExpense->BuyerExternal with ZERO driver OwnerLiability and NO Commission refund invoice (the absence proof). BAP legs + refund invoice are only spot-checked — their full role and invoice-field assertions are in 01.

exec: var envType = pm.environment.get('envType'); var msu = pm.environment.get('mockServerUrl') || ''; var url = pm.request.url.toString();
if (envType && envType !== 'Local' && msu && url.indexOf(msu) > -1) { if (pm.execution && typeof pm.execution.skipRequest === 'function') pm.execution.skipRequest(); }
// Dynamic refund amounts derived from the real ride's charged amount T (self-captured in THIS run's gate).
// rf1 = 0.5*cap (primary), rf2 = 0.25*cap (secondary partial), rf3 = 0.5*cap. Sized off the REAL RIDE_FARE
// component cap (rideFareCap, captured from fare_breakup_info) — NOT off T — so rf1 never spuriously trips
// the per-component cap on a ride with fees/toll/parking. Falls back to T until the gate sets rideFareCap.

item.name: Rider Auth
Rider OTP
Gate: latest COMPLETED booking for fixed rider (run 00 first)

exec: var b = completed.length ? completed[0] : (list.length ? list[0] : null);
pm.test('Run 00 first — fixed rider has a completed booking', function () {
pm.expect(b != null, 'no completed booking for the fixed rider; run 00 (FixtureStripeRide) first').to.eql(true);
if (b) { pm.environment.set('customer_bookingId', b.id); console.log('Gate: booking ' + b.id + ' status ' + b.status); }
var d = {}; try { d = pm.response.json(); } catch(e) {}
// the list handler can 500 transiently on an unrelated async notification fork — retry once before failing
pm.sendRequest({url: _gu, method: 'GET', header: {token: pm.environment.get('rider_token')}}, function (err, res) {
var d2 = {}; try { d2 = res.json(); } catch(e) {}

item.name: Capture BAP ride id (SQL — poll until drained)

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('BAP ride row drained (run 00 first)', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no ride for booking; run 00').to.be.above(0); }); return; }
// NOTE: r.id is the RIDE id. orderId is a SEPARATE payment_order GUID, captured next via domain_entity_id.

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Capture payment order short id + intent (SQL — poll until drained)

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('payment_order row present', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no payment_order for ride').to.be.above(0); }); return; }

pm.test('payment_order row present (orderId != rideId)', function(){ pm.expect(o.id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(o.id, 'orderId must be a real GUID, not the rideId').to.not.eql(pm.environment.get('rideId')); });
pm.test('order has a Stripe payment intent (pi_)', function(){ pm.expect(/^pi_/.test(String(o.payment_service_order_id))).to.eql(true); });

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('a CHARGED payment_transaction exists (refund cap source)', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no CHARGED txn after polling (charge settles after End Ride)').to.be.above(0); }); return; }
pm.test('a CHARGED payment_transaction exists (refund cap source)', function(){ pm.expect(rows.length).to.be.above(0); });

item.name: Capture BPP booking id + commission (SQL — poll until drained)

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('BPP ride row drained', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no BPP ride for id; KV not drained').to.be.above(0); }); return; }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: PRECONDITION: seeded ride has commission > 0 (commission gate)

exec: // HARD precondition: 02's success path approves with deductFromDriver=true (Case-2), which exercises the
// commission slice (RideFareRefundCommission leg + negative Commission refund invoice). Those checks
// SKIP when bpp_commission==0, so a zero-commission ride makes them vacuously green. Fail loudly here instead.
pm.test('PRECONDITION: seeded ride MUST have commission > 0 (else the Case-2 commission asserts are vacuous; re-run 00 with a commissioned ride)', function () {

pm.expect(_C, 'bpp_commission is ' + pm.environment.get('bpp_commission') + ' -> the commission-slice path (RideFareRefundCommission leg + negative Commission invoice) cannot be exercised').to.be.above(0);

item.name: Wait for BAP fare invoice drained (refund-invoice source)

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('BAP fare invoice drained (refund-invoice source)', function(){ pm.expect(0,'fare invoice not drained for ride').to.be.above(0); }); return; }
pm.test('BAP fare invoice drained (refund-invoice source)', function(){ pm.expect(rows.length).to.be.above(0); });

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Capture RIDE_FARE component cap (SQL fare_breakup_info — refund cap source)

exec: // RIDE_FARE cap = sum of these tags (= li.rideFare + li.gstAmount, RidePayment.hs:841). TOLL/PARKING analogous (same pattern for tollCap/parkingCap).
function _sum(arr, tags){ return (arr||[]).filter(function(b){ return tags.indexOf(b.description) >= 0; }).reduce(function(a,b){ return a + Number(b.amount||0); }, 0); }
if (rows && rows.length) { try { bk = JSON.parse(rows[0].fare_breakups || '[]'); } catch(e) { bk = []; } }
console.log('Gate: rideFareCap='+rfCap+' tollCap='+tollCap+' parkingCap='+parkCap+' (from fare_breakup_info; refund amounts fall back to T if rideFareCap=0)');
pm.test('RIDE_FARE component cap captured from fare_breakup_info', function(){ pm.expect(rfCap, 'zero RIDE_FARE cap — stale fixture, re-run 00').to.be.above(0); });

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Finalize refund env (riderToken alias + sanity gate)

exec: // 01-05 raise refunds as the customer via {{riderToken}}
pm.test('sanity: T captured and positive', function () { pm.expect(T).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('sanity: all refund ids captured', function () {
console.log('Refund env ready. T =', T, pm.environment.get('txn_currency'), '| commission =', pm.environment.get('bpp_commission'));
// Refund amounts sized off the REAL RIDE_FARE component cap (rideFareCap from fare_breakup_info),
// falling back to T if the cap was not captured. rf1=0.5*cap, rf2=0.25*cap, rf3=0.5*cap.

item.name: Reset refund state for the ride (clean start)

exec: // SYNCHRONOUS single clear — the runner waits for THIS request, so no async re-fire can wipe a later-created refund_request.
pm.test('refund state reset (synchronous clean start)', function(){ pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.oneOf([200,201]); });

item.name: Clear mock overrides (avoid leaked async state from an interrupted prior run)

exec: pm.test('mock overrides cleared (clean slate)', function(){ pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.oneOf([200,201,204]); });

item.name: Switch City for BAP (Rider Dashboard)

exec: pm.test('BAP dashboard switch OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.oneOf([200,201]); });

item.name: Raise Refund Request rf1 = T/2 (Customer)

exec: pm.test('raise accepted', function () { if (pm.response.code === 400 && /refundable cap/i.test(pm.response.text())) { pm.expect(false, 'Raise rejected by the per-component cap: rf1 (T/2) exceeds the RIDE_FARE component total (rideFare+gst). Reduce the T-fraction. Body: ' + pm.response.text()).to.be.true; } pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200,201]); });

item.name: Capture refundRequestId (SQL — after drain)

exec: pm.test('OPEN captured', function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.count).to.be.above(0); pm.environment.set('refundRequestId', d.rows[0].id); });

item.name: Approve Refund — Case 1 deductFromDriver=false (Admin)

exec: pm.test('approve -> REFUNDED/SUCCESS', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.oneOf([200,201]); var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.status).to.eql('REFUNDED'); pm.expect(d.refundStatus).to.eql('SUCCESS'); });

item.name: Assert BPP Case-1 per-component SellerExpense legs (no driver clawback, no commission)

exec: function _ok(rows){ var s=rows.filter(function(r){return r.status==='SETTLED' && _isRefund(r);}); if(!s.length) return false; var sum=s.reduce(function(a,r){return a+Number(r.amount);},0); return sum >= Number(pm.environment.get('rf1')) - 0.011; }
console.log('  ↳ expected (Case-1): RideFareRefund + RideFareRefundVAT ALL on SellerExpense->BuyerExternal, SUM to rf1 =', pm.environment.get('rf1'), '| NO driver/commission legs');
try { console.log('  ↳ DB rows:', JSON.stringify((rows||[]).map(function(x){ return {st:x.status, amt:x.amount, type:x.reference_type}; }))); } catch(e) {}
pm.test('Case-1: SETTLED per-component refund legs present (no-clawback is asserted via account roles in the account-roles item below)', function () {

// Case-1 (platform absorbs): per-component legs (RideFareRefund + RideFareRefundVAT, +Toll/Parking) ALL on SellerExpense->BuyerExternal (verify the role via the 📊 Finance view / a finance_account join), summing to gross rf1. NO driver clawback (OwnerLiability), NO RideFareRefundCommission slice.
pm.test('Case-1 BPP legs use the per-component refTypes, SUM to rf1, no commission slice', function () {
pm.expect(_settled.some(function (r) { return r.reference_type === 'RideFareRefundCommission'; }), 'Case-1 must NOT post a RideFareRefundCommission slice (that is Case-2 only)').to.be.false;

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }

item.name: Assert BPP refund leg ACCOUNT ROLES (Case-1: ALL SellerExpense, NO driver OwnerLiability)

exec: // The TRUE Case-1/Case-2 discriminator is the account ROLE (no role column exists). Resolve each leg's
// from_account_id -> finance_account (account_type + counterparty_type). Case-1 (platform absorbs): every leg
// debits SellerExpense = Expense + SELLER, and NO leg debits the driver OwnerLiability (Liability + DRIVER).
var ids = refLegs.map(function(l){ return l.from_account_id; }).filter(function(x){ return !!x; });
pm.test('Case-1 role check: settled BPP refund legs present', function(){ pm.expect(ids.length, 'no settled BPP refund legs with from_account_id to role-check').to.be.above(0); });
pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_acctBody(ids)} }, function(err,res){
try { console.log('  ↳ BPP leg roles:', JSON.stringify(refLegs.map(function(l){ var a=amap[l.from_account_id]||{}; return {type:l.reference_type, from_t:a.t, from_c:a.c}; }))); } catch(e){}
pm.test('Case-1: ALL refund legs debit SellerExpense (Expense + SELLER) -> platform absorbs', function(){

refLegs.forEach(function(l){ var a=amap[l.from_account_id]||{}; pm.expect(a.t, l.reference_type+' account_type (Case-1 must be Expense)').to.eql('Expense'); pm.expect(a.c, l.reference_type+' counterparty_type (Case-1 must be SELLER)').to.eql('SELLER'); });
pm.test('Case-1: NO OwnerLiability (driver clawback) leg -> driver payout untouched', function(){
var driverLiab = refLegs.filter(function(l){ var a=amap[l.from_account_id]||{}; return a.t==='Liability' && (a.c==='DRIVER' || a.c==='FLEET_OWNER'); });
pm.expect(driverLiab.length, 'Case-1 (platform absorbs) must NOT debit the driver OwnerLiability').to.eql(0);

item.name: Quick check: BAP refund legs settled + sum to rf1 (account roles asserted in 01)

exec: // Quick check only: the BAP role join (OwnerAsset->BuyerAsset) + exact per-component model are asserted in 01. BAP is deductFromDriver-invariant,
// so here we only confirm it settled identically to Case-2: >=1 SETTLED refund-typed leg summing to rf1. No role-join re-check.
try { console.log('  ↳ BAP settled refund legs:', JSON.stringify(settled.map(function(x){return {amt:x.amount,type:x.reference_type};}))); } catch(e){}
pm.test('Quick check: BAP refund legs SETTLED and SUM to rf1 (account roles asserted in 01)', function () {

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }

// Here we only confirm one exists and is negative.
pm.test('Quick check: a negative Paid BAP refund invoice exists (all fields asserted in 01)', function () {

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }

item.name: Assert BPP refund invoice Paid/negative + NO Commission invoice (Case-1)

exec: try { console.log('  ↳ BPP invoices(booking):', JSON.stringify((rows||[]).map(function(x){return {st:x.status, total:x.total_amount, type:x.invoice_type};}))); } catch(e){}
pm.test('BPP refund invoice present (Paid, negative)', function () {
pm.expect(refundInv.length, 'expected a Paid BPP Refund invoice on the booking').to.be.above(0);
pm.expect(Number(refundInv[0].total_amount), 'BPP refund invoice total must be negative').to.be.below(0);
// Case-1 (deductFromDriver=false): the Commission refund invoice is gated on deductFromDriver (RefundLedger.hs:112) -> none here. It is keyed by reference_id=refundRequestId, so check that.
pm.test('Case-1 posts NO Commission refund invoice', function () {
pm.expect((crows||[]).filter(function(r){return r.invoice_type==='Commission';}).length, 'Case-1 (platform absorbs) must NOT create a Commission refund invoice').to.eql(0);

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }
